title: XPeng (XPEV) Stock: November Deliveries Jump 19% as AI Tech Rollout Nears
text: XPeng (XPEV) reported November 2025 deliveries with strong year-over-year growth despite sequential softness. The company delivered 36,728 Smart EVs in November, representing a 19% year-on-year increase. While month-over-month deliveries declined 12.6% from October's 42,013 vehicles, the annual comparison remained solid. The company's November AI technology announcements, including the VLA 2.0 system and next-generation robotics, positioned XPeng for a major technology rollout in 2026. The XNGP autonomous driving system achieved an 84% monthly active user penetration rate in urban driving, demonstrating strong user adoption of advanced driver assistance features. These developments suggest XPeng is shifting focus toward becoming a Physical AI company alongside its EV manufacturing business.
